1:
hi Dani happy birthday I forgot how much you are turning btw but every happy birthday

2:
Happy birthday Dani!!!!
Along with a good person, you've also been a good friend.
You're super kind and very sympathetic. Actually honestly, you're kind of a unique friend I've had. Like you're different from everyone else but in a good way. 
Enjoy your day! 
Happy 15th bday!
3:
Hey bro!!
Just here to say a bunch of things since it's (was) ur bday. First, ofc, Happy birthday! Then I just wanted to yap a little bit.

So, you've always been a very kind person! You don't judge, and you say nothing bad to anyone! That's amazing, I wish I could do that too. I also like very much your drawings, they're very cool and I like your silly art style!

Honestly, I would say you are the one of the kindest and most respectful people I ever met! You're a real friend and I'm happy I can be part of your friend group!

Also, I find it really cool that only because of the fact that I'm a woman you don't treat me different, I really like it! 

Lastly: happy birthday again! I know I already said it at the starting but I just wanted to make sure you read it! 
Have an amazing time,

-Sofia
4:
Happy birthday Dani! I wish you the best life you could possibly have, Im very happy that we
became friends :) and nowaday we are best friends and having a great time with each other, we have
so many memories together and all of them are happy. I wish you like my present.
Thank you for everything. Martin Sanches your best friend :3
Happy birthday again!

-Martin
5:
Heya, how does being 15 feel? Feels the same as being 14? Yea, thought so. But hey you’re officially 3 years away from being able to get arrested.

So, 3 years till we become adults, they say youth goes by fast, but i didn’t expect it to be this fast, but I digress. I wonder why I feel so comfortable sharing everything with you, I really do, I really do wonder why I’d rather share some of my deepest thoughts with you than I would with Sofia. Maybe it’s because of how kind you are ? But really, you’re one of the kindest and nicest people I know (And I’m really sorry about the beach trip, you tried really hard to plan the best beach trip and we couldn’t because our parents couldn’t come.).

Now, for the actual important part: Happy Birthday!!

Happy birthday man, I wish for you to be happy for the next years to come.

And I have one last wish for your birthday: I really do hope you get a girlfriend who actually loves you for who you are.

IMPORTANT!!!! 

You gotta remember man, you’re in your youth, don’t let it blow past you, this is the period of your life that you’re supposed to enjoy the most, so carry on ever forward without letting simple things weigh you down.

Best regards,

-Nithilan
6:
DATA_VERIFY_PAK // CLEARANCE_RECORD

The approval system was never about the subjects.

AXIOM-7 is not a person. It is a protocol designation for any asset operating outside normal jurisdictional authority — above LVL-5 clearance by default.

When you approved AXIOM-7, you approved a ghost. Every shadow operative Meridian ever ran. Every assassination. Every cover-up.

LVL-5 clearance was only ever held by four people. Two are missing. One is dead. The fourth is reading this.

Sincerely,
